biological_replicate: we used different batches of BSM, provided by Merck KgaA
experimental_design: comparison of two different batches of BSM
we wanted to determine to which extent data obtained from rheological characterization may depend on the choice of BSM batch
factor_value: concentration (10, 20, 60, 100, 140 mg/mL), additives (NaCl, CaCl2, MgCl2, lysozyme, DNA)
we conducted concentration studies of BSM and examined the effects of various additives, NaCl, CaCl2, MgCl2, lysozyme, and DNA
number_of_biological_replicates: we used different batches of BSM
number_of_samples: we used different batches of BSM
